prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_enrollment_case student_party_1)
(assign_support_resource_to_case student_party_1 support_resource_helpdesk)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(validate_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(assign_remediation_option_to_student student_party_1 student_schedule_slot_1 remediation_option_makeup_session)
(confirm_remediation_and_reserve_student_slot student_party_1 student_schedule_slot_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log remediation_option_makeup_session)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(register_enrollment_case instructor_party_1)
(assign_support_resource_to_case instructor_party_1 support_resource_it)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case instructor_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(validate_case instructor_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(assign_remediation_option_to_instructor instructor_party_1 instructor_schedule_slot_1 remediation_option_makeup_session)
(confirm_remediation_and_reserve_instructor_slot instructor_party_1 instructor_schedule_slot_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log remediation_option_makeup_session)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case instructor_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(assemble_recovery_plan_with_confirmed_slots student_party_1 instructor_party_1 student_schedule_slot_1 instructor_schedule_slot_1 recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(lock_recovery_plan_for_execution recovery_plan_candidate_1 student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(register_enrollment_case case_manager_1)
(assign_support_resource_to_case case_manager_1 support_resource_registrar)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case case_manager_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(validate_case case_manager_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(verify_and_attach_course_requirement case_manager_1 course_requirement_lab_assessment recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(prepare_manager_for_requirement_validation case_manager_1 course_requirement_lab_assessment recovery_plan_candidate_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(assign_technical_approval_to_manager case_manager_1 technical_approval_it_signoff)
(assign_approver_to_case case_manager_1 approver_faculty_representative)
(initiate_manager_internal_approval case_manager_1 technical_approval_it_signoff approver_faculty_representative course_requirement_lab_assessment recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(revoke_technical_approval_from_manager case_manager_1 technical_approval_it_signoff)
(release_approver_from_case case_manager_1 approver_faculty_representative)
(attach_audit_record_to_manager case_manager_1 audit_record_1)
(obtain_external_authority_approval_for_manager case_manager_1 audit_record_1 course_requirement_lab_assessment recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(revoke_audit_record_from_manager case_manager_1 audit_record_1)
(perform_final_checks_and_mark_case_ready case_manager_1)
(apply_administrative_correction_to_case case_manager_1 communication_channel_email system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(reassign_resource_and_notify_manager case_manager_1 support_resource_registrar communication_channel_email)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case case_manager_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(register_enrollment_case case_manager_2)
(assign_support_resource_to_case case_manager_2 support_resource_registrar)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case case_manager_2 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(validate_case case_manager_2 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(verify_and_attach_course_requirement case_manager_2 course_requirement_attendance recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(prepare_manager_for_requirement_validation case_manager_2 course_requirement_attendance recovery_plan_candidate_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(assign_technical_approval_to_manager case_manager_2 technical_approval_it_signoff)
(assign_approver_to_case case_manager_2 approver_faculty_representative)
(initiate_manager_internal_approval case_manager_2 technical_approval_it_signoff approver_faculty_representative course_requirement_attendance recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(revoke_technical_approval_from_manager case_manager_2 technical_approval_it_signoff)
(release_approver_from_case case_manager_2 approver_faculty_representative)
(attach_audit_record_to_manager case_manager_2 audit_record_1)
(obtain_external_authority_approval_for_manager case_manager_2 audit_record_1 course_requirement_attendance recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(revoke_audit_record_from_manager case_manager_2 audit_record_1)
(perform_final_checks_and_mark_case_ready case_manager_2)
(apply_administrative_correction_to_case case_manager_2 communication_channel_email system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(reassign_resource_and_notify_manager case_manager_2 support_resource_registrar communication_channel_email)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case case_manager_2 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(execute_student_recovery_from_plan student_party_1 recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(apply_administrative_correction_to_case student_party_1 communication_channel_email system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(reassign_resource_and_notify_student student_party_1 support_resource_helpdesk communication_channel_email)
(detach_system_artifact_from_case student_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(execute_instructor_recovery_from_plan instructor_party_1 recovery_plan_candidate_1)
(attach_system_artifact_to_case instructor_party_1 system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(apply_administrative_correction_to_case instructor_party_1 communication_channel_email system_artifact_enrollment_log)
(reassign_resource_and_notify_instructor instructor_party_1 support_resource_it communication_channel_email)
message.reasoning:
The problem is about recovering from an education system outage for enrollment. The goal is to have recovery applied to student_party_1, instructor_party_1, case_manager_1, and case_manager_2.


## Addressing Education System Outage  
- The task focuses on recovering from an outage affecting the education system's enrollment process.  
- Recovery needs to be applied to student_party_1, instructor_party_1, case_manager_1, and case_manager_2.

## Addressing Education System Outage  
- Recovery involves student_party_1, instructor_party_1, case_manager_1, and case_manager_2, all subtypes of enrollment_case.  
- Predicates using ?enrollment_case apply to these, but initially, no entities are registered, starting with registering the enrollment_case.

## Examining Recovery Process  
- Recovery_applied is set in reassign_resource_and_notify_* actions, requiring subject_finalized, resource_assigned_to_subject, and communication_channel_assigned_to_subject.  
- Subject_finalized is achieved via apply_administrative_correction_to_case, needing subject_ready_for_recovery, artifact_attached_to_subject, and comm_available.  

## Analyzing Support and Artifacts  
- Each case needs a registered enrollment_case and a support resource assigned, with three available: helpdesk, IT, and registrar, but four cases to cover.  
- Only one system_artifact, enrollment_log, is available, shared across cases, with one approver and remediation_option.

## Assessing Validation Requirements  
- Managers, students, and instructors all require subject_validated to perform key actions like attaching documents or initiating approvals.  
- Achieving subject_validated involves registering the case, assigning a support resource, attaching an artifact, and validating it.  

## Evaluating Resource Constraints  
- Only three support resources (helpdesk, IT, registrar) are available, but there are four cases (student, instructor, two case managers).  
- The single artifact, enrollment_log, can be reused by detaching and reattaching, but support resources cannot be shared simultaneously.  

## Investigating Feasibility  
- All four cases need to be validated and have a resource assigned to reach recovery_applied, which seems impossible given the resource limit.  
- Exploring if recovery_applied for managers could bypass resource assignment, but current preconditions suggest validation and resources are necessary for all.

## Investigating Resource Assignment  
- Both case_manager_1 and case_manager_2 are assigned to student_party_1, with different requirements like lab_assessment and attendance.  
- External links differ, with case_manager_1 tied to registrar_office and case_manager_2 to accreditation_contact, potentially affecting recovery planning.  

## Exploring Manager Roles  
- Recovery_applied seems required for all four entities, but resources can't be shared, leaving a gap with only three supports.  
- No actions found to set subject_validated without validate_case, reinforcing the need for resource assignment to all.  

## Reassessing Feasibility  
- All cases, including students and instructors, need subject_ready_for_recovery to finalize, which requires validation and resources.  
- The problem appears unsolvable given the resource limit, as no workaround bypasses the need for assigned supports for each case.

## Analyzing Recovery Paths  
- Students and instructors can set recovery_applied by locking a plan and executing recovery, which requires validated status and an attached artifact.  
- Managers set recovery_applied via reassign_resource_and_notify_manager, but all paths ultimately need validated cases with assigned resources.  

## Exploring Slot Management  
- Slots can be reserved via reserve_*_schedule_slot, requiring validated parties, attached artifacts, and available slots, setting them as reserved.  
- Approvers, like faculty_representative, can be assigned and released, allowing reuse, while remediation options like makeup_session can also be confirmed and reused.  

## Optimizing Resource Use  
- Using the remediation path avoids needing an approver, which is limited to one, making it viable for students and instructors to share the single remediation option by confirming and releasing.  
- Artifact reuse is possible after validation, enabling sequential processing for student and instructor cases despite limited resources.

## Outlining Sequential Steps  
- The process starts with registering enrollment cases for both student and instructor, followed by assigning support resources like helpdesk or IT.  
- Artifacts, such as system_artifact_enrollment_log, are attached to cases and validated, enabling further actions like scheduling.  

## Managing Remediation Paths  
- Remediation options, like makeup_session, are assigned to avoid needing approvers, setting parties as eligible and slots as provisional.  
- Confirmation reserves slots and frees up remediation options, allowing reuse for subsequent cases like the instructor’s.  

## Handling Artifact Reuse  
- Artifacts remain attached during validation and confirmation but can be detached afterward to free them for other cases.  
- This sequential reuse of artifacts and resources enables processing student and instructor cases with limited supports.  

## Coordinating Manager Tasks  
- Managers, each handling specific requirements like lab_assessment or attendance, need a locked plan to verify course requirements.  
- The process involves creating and locking a plan, then initiating approvals, potentially splitting tasks between two managers for efficiency.

## Examining Manager Requirements  
- Managers must verify their own requirements, such as lab_assessment or attendance, linked to their plans.  
- Case Manager 2 (cm2) follows a similar validation process as Case Manager 1 (cm1), despite initial resource assignments.  

## Managing Artifact Availability  
- Detach system_artifact_enrollment_log from cm1’s case to make it available for cm2, ensuring sequential processing.  
- Artifacts remain attached during validation but can be freed afterward for reuse in other cases.  

## Handling External Authority Links  
- Cm1 links to the registrar office, while cm2 links to the accreditation contact, but only the registrar office is initially available.  
- External authority approvals can proceed without routing, relying on audit attachments and initiation, bypassing availability checks.

## Managing Resource Reassignment  
- Attach system artifacts to student cases, like email, and apply administrative corrections to finalize them.  
- Reassign resources, such as helpdesk support, and notify students after finalization, making resources available for reuse.  

## Verifying Manager Requirements  
- Managers must verify requirements, like attendance, to prepare for approvals, as preparation actions require linked and verified requirements.  
- Without verification, managers cannot proceed, as no alternative paths exist to set the prepared_for_approval state.  

## Handling External Authority Constraints  
- Only the registrar office is initially available for external authority links, not accreditation, limiting routing options for Case Manager 2 (cm2).  
- External approvals proceed without routing, relying on audits and initiation, bypassing availability issues for both cm1 and cm2.  

## Coordinating Resource Reuse  
- After use by cm1, resources like registrar support and approvers are released and reassigned to cm2, ensuring sequential processing.  
- Technical and audit resources follow the same reuse pattern, maintaining availability for subsequent manager tasks.  

## Managing Approval Processes  
- Initiate internal approvals without committee flags since no oversight committees are required, using initiate_manager_internal_approval.  
- Obtain external authority approvals directly, as no department or committee requirements are needed, streamlining the process.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
